creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
> After talking to acm@FreeBSD.org, he asked me to submit a PR so that >we can find a new maintainer of net/twinkle port. There is a new bug fix  >version out that fixes some nasty bugs. More info can be found at >http://www.twinklephone.com/
> Thanks

Some times, we (freebsd commiters) need to receive a bit of help from
some freebsd users, if i said you if you could send a PR, it was
because currently i'm a bit busy and with some problems  with my isp,
but i'm still trying help with some of my ports, really i don't found
the reason for this PR.

If you can send  a PR for update twinkle, another committer could commit it.

Greetings
ACM
